description: Change (map) the features (genes) of a dataset
author: Justin Lamb gp-help@broad.mit.edu and Pablo Tamayo gp-help@broad.mit.edu
plan:
## MapChipFeaturesGeneral GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
MapChipFeaturesGeneral is a GenePattern module that Change (map) the features (genes) of a dataset

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 5 parameters:
- Required: input.filename, lookup.table.filename, table.format, direction, output.prefix
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<perl> <libdir>MapChipFeaturesGeneral.pl -F <input.filename> -T <lookup.table.filename> -d <direction> -f <table.format> -o <output.prefix>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: lookup.table.filename
parameters.description: Name of the look up table file with the feature mapping
